column1: # GIFNO-FDO-XT round-1: 2D trunk + capacity sweep on wide_h1_p1_amsgrad backbone @ --limit 2000
# Defaults: LATENT=96, DEEPONET=128, LOSS_P=1, AMSGRAD=true, X_COORD normalized by domain half-width
# Frequency-band loss curriculum on the lat128_d128 backbone (A/B vs xt_lat128_d128_full)
# Tier 1: retuned schedule (from config defaults) + band-aware selection + longer patience.
# Tier 2: closed-loop convergence-gated curriculum on the band-balanced loss term,
# with LR/optimizer warm-restart per phase. Selection metric forced to band_balanced.
# Seed-conditional recipe: depth branch, softplus, Vs macro/RF split, dual-path FNO,
# within-sample_id contrast + soft σ_ln aux (or GIFNO_SEED_CONDITIONAL_RECIPE=1).
# Primary loss stays linear |TF| (LOG_TF_LOSS=false) — log rel-L2 smooths spectra.
